004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
025
026/**
027 * Specialized writer for serializing INI format.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Extends {@link SerializerWriter} with INI-specific methods for sections, key-value pairs,
031 * comments, and quoted strings.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='note'>This class is not intended for external use.
035 * </ul>
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Ini">INI Basics</a>
039 * </ul>
040 */
041@SuppressWarnings({
042   "resource" // Writer resource managed by calling code
043})
044public class IniWriter extends SerializerWriter {
045
046   /** Key-value separator character. */
047   protected final char kvSeparator;
048
049   /** Whether to add spaces around the separator. */
050   protected final boolean spacedSeparator;
051
052   /**
053    * Constructor.
054    *
055    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
056    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, use blank lines between sections.
057    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level (unused for INI).
058    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, trim strings before serialization.
059    * @param kvSeparator The key-value separator ('=' or ':').
060    * @param spacedSeparator If <jk>true</jk>, add spaces around separator.
061    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver.
062    */
063   protected IniWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean trimStrings, char kvSeparator, boolean spacedSeparator, UriResolver uriResolver) {
064      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, trimStrings, '\'', uriResolver);
065      this.kvSeparator = kvSeparator;
066      this.spacedSeparator = spacedSeparator;
067   }
068
069   /**
070    * Writes a section header with optional preceding blank line.
071    *
072    * @param name The section name or path (e.g. "address" or "employment/company").
073    * @return This object.
074    */
075   public IniWriter section(String name) {
076      w('\n');
077      w('[').w(name).w(']').w('\n');
078      return this;
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Writes a comment line.
083    *
084    * @param text The comment text.
085    * @return This object.
086    */
087   public IniWriter comment(String text) {
088      w("# ");
089      if (ine(text)) {
090         var lines = text.split("\n");
091         for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
092            if (i > 0)
093               w("\n# ");
094            w(lines[i]);
095         }
096      }
097      w('\n');
098      return this;
099   }
100
101   /**
102    * Writes a key-value pair.
103    *
104    * @param key The key name.
105    * @param value The value (already formatted as string).
106    * @return This object.
107    */
108   public IniWriter keyValue(String key, String value) {
109      w(key);
110      if (spacedSeparator)
111         w(" ").w(kvSeparator).w(" ");
112      else
113         w(kvSeparator);
114      w(value != null ? value : "null");
115      w('\n');
116      return this;
117   }
118
119   /**
120    * Writes a single-quoted string value with escaping.
121    *
122    * <p>
123    * Single quotes within the value are escaped as <c>''</c>.
124    *
125    * @param value The raw string value.
126    * @return This object.
127    */
128   public IniWriter quotedString(String value) {
129      if (value == null) {
130         w("null");
131         return this;
132      }
133      w('\'').w(value.replace("'", "''")).w('\'');
134      return this;
135   }
136
137   /**
138    * Writes a blank line.
139    *
140    * @return This object.
141    */
142   public IniWriter blankLine() {
143      w('\n');
144      return this;
145   }
146
147   // Override return types for chaining
148   @Override public IniWriter append(char c) { super.append(c); return this; }
149   @Override public IniWriter append(char[] value) { super.append(value); return this; }
150   @Override public IniWriter append(int indent, char c) { super.append(indent, c); return this; }
151   @Override public IniWriter append(int indent, String text) { super.append(indent, text); return this; }
152   @Override public IniWriter append(Object text) { super.append(text); return this; }
153   @Override public IniWriter append(String text) { super.append(text); return this; }
154   @Override public IniWriter appendIf(boolean b, char c) { super.appendIf(b, c); return this; }
155   @Override public IniWriter appendIf(boolean b, String text) { super.appendIf(b, text); return this; }
156   @Override public IniWriter appendln(int indent, String text) { super.appendln(indent, text); return this; }
157   @Override public IniWriter appendln(String text) { super.appendln(text); return this; }
158   @Override public IniWriter appendUri(Object value) { super.appendUri(value); return this; }
159   @Override public IniWriter cr(int depth) { super.cr(depth); return this; }
160   @Override public IniWriter cre(int depth) { super.cre(depth); return this; }
161   @Override public IniWriter i(int indent) { super.i(indent); return this; }
162   @Override public IniWriter ie(int indent) { super.ie(indent); return this; }
163   @Override public IniWriter nl(int indent) { super.nl(indent); return this; }
164   @Override public IniWriter nlIf(boolean flag, int indent) { super.nlIf(flag, indent); return this; }
165   @Override public IniWriter q() { super.q(); return this; }
166   @Override public IniWriter s() { super.s(); return this; }
167   @Override public IniWriter sIf(boolean flag) { super.sIf(flag); return this; }
168   @Override public IniWriter w(char value) { super.w(value); return this; }
169   @Override public IniWriter w(String value) { super.w(value); return this; }
170}
